title: Profile Summary
content: Sameer Arora is an AI and Machine Learning engineer focused on practical GenAI systems, RAG workflows, and production-ready ML solutions.

title: Contact Details
content: Email: sameerar.001@gmail.com | Phone: (+91) 94160-63952 | LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/sameerar01 | GitHub: github.com/5AMEER

title: Education - Integrated B.Tech + M.Tech (AI & ML)
content: Integrated Bachelor and Master of Technology in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning from Amity University, Gurugram, Haryana with GPA 8.65/10.

title: Education - Class XII
content: Senior Secondary (CBSE, Science Non-Medical) from Cambridge School, Rewari with 74.6 percent.

title: Education - Class X
content: Matriculation (CBSE) from Cambridge School, Rewari with GPA 10/10.

title: Core Technical Skills
content: Python, Machine Learning, TensorFlow, GCP, Computer Vision, MCP, RAG, Docker, Kubernetes, LangChain, LangGraph, Langfuse, GenAI, PyTorch, and Vibe Coding.

title: Additional Competencies
content: Problem solving, technical mentorship, communication, decision making, and analysis.

title: Work Experience - TCS
content: Machine Learning Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services, Hyderabad, from May 2025 to present, contributing to core GenAI and client-facing RAG/LLM solutions.

title: TCS Impact Highlights
content: Built Langfuse observability dashboards and traced 120+ observations, identified and removed 30+ redundant LLM calls, improving efficiency and reducing costs.

title: Clinical AI Pipeline
content: Engineered an LLM-driven pipeline mapping patient responses to ADDA questionnaires and automated clinical diagnostic report generation.

title: Hackathon Recognition
content: Runner-up at TCS AI Friday Hackathon for building a RAG pipeline to detect copyright infringement and policy violations in media content.

title: Technical Mentor - Kalvium
content: Mentored 107 first-year undergraduate students in programming fundamentals, AI concepts, and problem-solving between July and October 2024.

title: ML Consultant - Ess Kay Associates
content: Built a loan eligibility classification model using around 180 real-world applicant profiles and helped shift the firm toward ML-powered R&D decisions.

title: Project - AI-powered ERP System
content: Built an enterprise full-stack ERP with advanced billing, inventory, financial reporting, WhatsApp marketing automation, and LangChain-based RAG for conversational BI.

title: Project - AI Team Manager using MCP
content: Implemented an MCP server for leave management, approvals, balance checks, task assignment, progress tracking, and push notifications via AI clients.

title: Project - Spotify Playlist Generator
content: Developed a web scraping workflow with Python and BeautifulSoup and integrated Spotify API with robust exception handling for unavailable tracks.

title: Publication - IEEE INNOCOMP 2024
content: Published work on interpretable features of YOLOv8 for weapon detection in IEEE International Conference on Emerging Innovations and Advanced Computing, September 2024.

title: Publication - ACM ICIMMI 2024
content: Published The All-Seeing Eye for constructive weapon detection using YOLOv8 object detection model in ACM International Conference on Information Management and Machine Intelligence, May 2024.

title: Patent Publication
content: Advanced Gun and Weapon Detection System with Optimizer Impact Analysis, patent publication number 202411072702 A, available on 11 October 2024.

title: Certifications
content: Completed Model Context Protocol (Udemy, Nov 2025), Prompt Engineering for AI Bootcamp (Oct 2025), and TensorFlow Developer Certificate Training (Udemy, Jul 2023).

title: Leadership - SHAKTI Club
content: Served as Director of Media and Operations (2022-2024), led social strategy, content operations, and collaboration for inter-college events.

title: Leadership - Badminton Team Captain
content: Captain of university badminton team in 2023, led trials, match strategy, and team coordination contributing to runner-up finishes in inter-college competitions.

title: Stella Assistant Scope
content: Stella is Sameer’s portfolio AI assistant for answering questions on profile, contact, experience, projects, skills, publications, and career achievements.
